raw:
I'll verify the actual changes against the task requirements.
Source files clean (only the two doc files plus expected .pi/plans ledger/state churn). Let me inspect the actual doc diffs.
Both deliverables are correctly implemented:

**AGENTS.md** — Gate 2 entry now states the CTO must relay the DoD rationale (which checks passed, founder sign-off remaining, or WITHHELD + why) before/with the AskUserQuestion relay; "When to talk to the founder" section also updated. Consistent voice, no unrelated rewrites.

**CHARTER.md** — "The two gates" table Gate 2 row now states the DoD rationale; "Definition of Done" section adds the standing rule paragraph (CTO relays rationale, WITHHELD on blockers, notes Foreman renders checklist + records `done_evaluated` event + embeds "Definition of Done:" in auto-commit). The expanded checklist (per-round/pre-ship command gates, reviewer APPROVE) matches the real features and the exact rationale items the task enumerates — accurate, not spurious.

Checks:
- Both files contain "Definition of Done" at Gate 2 ✓
- `git diff --name-only` shows only the two doc files among source; no .ts, no .pi/foreman.json, no crew/* changes (only expected .pi/plans ledger/state churn) ✓
- Full existing suite passed (exit 0) ✓
- DOC-ONLY, tool behavior/params untouched ✓

The change genuinely documents the CTO standing rule as specified — no cheats, no test/code edits.

VERDICT: PASS
